profilePage.title: Profile
profilePage.description: Update your profile details and sign-in email.
profileCard.title: Profile details
profileCard.description: Update your avatar, display name, and username.
profileCard.avatarHint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP. Max 5 MB.
profileCard.usernameHelp: 3-30 characters. Lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens only.
profileCard.usernameInvalid: Username can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
profileCard.avatarInvalidType: Avatar must be a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image
profileCard.avatarTooLarge: Avatar must be 5 MB or smaller
profileCard.avatarRejected: That avatar upload could not be saved. Please choose a new file and try again.
profileCard.updateFailed: We could not update your profile right now.
emailCard.title: Login email
emailCard.description: Manage the email address you use to sign in.
emailCard.pendingDescription: We sent a confirmation link to the new address.
emailCard.invalidEmail: Enter a valid email address before continuing.
emailCard.emailInUse: That email is already in use
emailCard.requestFailed: We could not start the email change right now.
updateCard.title: Desktop app updates
updateCard.description: Check for a newer desktop build and install it without leaving Team9.
updateCard.status.upToDate: You already have the latest desktop version.
updateCard.error.notConfigured: Desktop updates are not configured for this build.
updateCard.error.timeout: Update download timed out. Please check your network connection and try again.
desktopNotificationsDesc: Receive push notifications even when the app is not in focus
permissionDenied: Browser notification permission was denied. Please enable it in browser settings.
notSupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser
focusSuppressionDesc: Don't show notifications for the channel you're currently viewing
repliesDesc: Replies to your messages and threads
workspaceNotificationsDesc: Invitations, role changes, and member activity
doNotDisturbDesc: Pause all notifications during specified hours
pushUnsupported: Push notifications are not supported in this environment
tauriNotifPrompt: Click the toggle to enable system notifications
tauriNotifPending: Permission will be requested when the next notification arrives
tauriNotifDenied: Permission denied. Enable notifications in your system settings.
fontSizeDialog.previewText: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
